name: Platform Decision Agent (Ectropy Internal)
description: Internal Platform Agent using the Dual-Process Decision Engine for Ectropy's own development planning, feature roadmapping, and venture coordination. This agent operates on code/feature planning data in the private luh-tech/Ectropy-Business repository, completely isolated from tenant construction data.

problem.description: Ectropy development decisions are made ad-hoc without leveraging the same cognitive architecture used for construction decisions
problem.impact: Inconsistent feature decomposition, repeated planning mistakes, no pattern reuse from successful milestones

solution.description: Apply the production-ready Dual-Process Decision Engine to Ectropy's own planning process
solution.mechanism: Platform Agent with isolated data context, domain-specific Success Stack patterns, and authority cascade (Dev → Architect → Erik)

strategicContext.differentiator: Only platform that uses its own decision intelligence for internal development - dogfooding at the architectural level

isolationArchitecture.description: Platform Agent operates in complete isolation from Tenant Agents

layers.implementation: Platform data exists only in luh-tech/Ectropy-Business (private)
Platform Agent uses tenant_id = NULL (platform admin scope)
layers.note: PostgreSQL RLS bypassed for platform operations

layers.implementation: Platform patterns stored in separate tier, never mixed with tenant patterns

tiers.platform: Feature delivery, venture coordination, schema design

layers.implementation: excluded_contexts blocks tenant data from platform queries

schemaAlignment.description: Bidirectional mapping between Decision Engine and Roadmap schemas

healthScore.description: Maps to SDI for milestone health assessment

eigenmodeSnapshot.description: EFAS eigenmode values at milestone snapshot

patternConfidence.description: Success Stack match confidence for milestone approach

explorationBudget.description: USF exploration allocation for novel approaches

monitoringTriggers.description: Early warning conditions (SDI breach, timeline deviation)

platformDomainPatterns.description: Success Stack patterns specific to Ectropy platform development

categories.description: Patterns for breaking features into milestones

examplePatterns.name: STAGING_GATE_PATTERN
examplePatterns.description: Always validate on staging before production

milestones.name: Schema Extension (V3.1)
milestones.description: Extend roadmap schema with decision engine cognitive fields
completionCriteria: healthScore, eigenmodeSnapshot, patternConfidence fields added to roadmap milestones
classification, dependsOn, blocks fields added to decision events
JSON Schema validation passes
Backward compatible with V3.0

milestones.name: Platform Success Stack Initialization
milestones.description: Create initial platform pattern library from historical decisions
completionCriteria: 50+ initial platform patterns seeded
Patterns cover feature decomposition, schema design, deployment
Pattern confidence scores based on historical outcomes
Platform tier isolated from tenant tiers

milestones.name: Platform Agent MCP Configuration
milestones.description: Configure MCP tools for platform agent context
completionCriteria: Platform agent tool whitelist configured
Excluded contexts block tenant data
Authority cascade routes to Dev → Architect → Erik
Platform-specific SDI calculation (12 platform eigenmodes)

milestones.name: Decision-Milestone Linking
milestones.description: Implement bidirectional linking between decisions and milestones
completionCriteria: Decisions link to milestones via linkedMilestoneUrn field
graphMetadata edges connect decision ↔ milestone
Query: 'What decisions drove this milestone?' works
Classification propagates decision → pattern

milestones.name: Platform Agent Integration
milestones.description: Full integration of platform agent with Ectropy planning workflow
deliverables: Integration tests for platform agent scenarios
completionCriteria: Platform agent makes feature decomposition recommendations
Pattern matching for milestone approach (>60% match rate)
Novel exploration for unprecedented features
Full audit trail of platform decisions

platformAgentTools.note: Platform tools exclude construction-specific PM decision tools

platformEigenmodes.description: 12 eigenmodes specific to Ectropy platform health

modes.name: codebase_health
modes.description: TypeScript errors, linting warnings, code quality metrics

modes.name: test_coverage
modes.description: Unit, integration, and E2E test coverage percentages

modes.name: technical_debt
modes.description: TODO count, deprecated usage, complexity metrics

modes.name: ci_stability
modes.description: CI pass rate, flaky test rate, build times

modes.name: deployment_frequency
modes.description: Deploy cadence, rollback rate, DORA metrics

modes.name: documentation_coverage
modes.description: JSDoc coverage, README completeness, API docs

modes.name: performance_regression
modes.description: Response times, memory usage, bundle size

modes.name: security_posture
modes.description: Vulnerability count, secrets exposure, auth coverage

modes.name: team_velocity
modes.description: PR throughput, review time, cycle time

modes.name: feature_completion
modes.description: Milestone completion rate, scope creep, rework rate

phase1.name: Foundation (Week 1)
tasks: Create V3.1 schema extensions for roadmap milestones
Add decision-milestone linking fields to decision-event schema

phase2.name: Pattern Library (Week 2)
tasks: Seed 50+ platform patterns from historical milestones
Create schema design and deployment patterns

patternMatchRate.description: Percentage of platform decisions with applicable patterns

explorationSuccessRate.description: Novel approaches that improve on patterns

decisionAuditCoverage.description: All platform decisions have full audit trail
